source_papers: Li et al. (2023) - Replicating and Digesting Anomalies in Chinese A-share Market
Shin et al. (2024) - Synergistic Formulaic Alpha Generation via RL
Bali et al. (2011) - Maxing out: Stocks as lotteries
Ang et al. (2006) - Cross-Section of Volatility
Sloan (1996) - Do Stock Prices Fully Reflect Information in Accruals
Novy-Marx (2013) - The Other Side of Value: Gross Profitability
Jegadeesh & Titman (1993) - Returns to Buying Winners and Selling Losers
Zhang et al. (2025) - CSAlpha: Cross-sectional Alpha with Attention
Zhang et al. (2023) - More Powerful Tests for Anomalies in China A-Share
DeMiguel et al. (2025) - Not All Factors Crowd Equally
Ball et al. (2016) - Accruals, Cash Flows, and Operating Profitability
Harvey et al. (2016) - ... and the Cross-Section of Expected Returns
Fama & French (2015) - A Five-Factor Asset Pricing Model
Hou et al. (2015) - Digesting Anomalies: An Investment Approach
Carhart (1997) - On Persistence in Mutual Fund Performance
Stambaugh et al. (2012) - The Short of It: Investor Sentiment and Anomalies
Asness (1997) - The Interaction of Value and Momentum Strategies
Blitz & van Vliet (2007) - The Volatility Effect
Pastor & Stambaugh (2003) - Liquidity Risk and Expected Stock Returns
Titman et al. (2004) - Capital Investment and Stock Returns
Cooper et al. (2008) - Asset Growth and the Cross-Section of Stock Returns
Campbell et al. (2008) - Search in the Stock Market
Easley et al. (2002) - Is Information Risk a Determinant of Asset Returns?
Chordia et al. (2000) - Trading Volume and Cross-Autocorrelations in Stock Returns
Hong & Stein (1999) - A Unified Theory of Underreaction, Momentum, and Overreaction
Moskowitz & Grinblatt (1999) - Do Industries Explain Momentum?
Daniel & Titman (2006) - Market Reactions to Tangible and Intangible Information

factors.name: 短期反转(成交量加权)
factors.a_share_validation: 强 (A股散户主导，过度反应显著)

definition.explanation: 过去20日成交量加权平均收益，取负值排序。高成交量下的反转更强(散户过度反应)。

steps: 1. 计算20日收益率 ret_20d = (close / delay(close,20)) - 1
2. 计算20日成交量 volume_20d = ts_mean(volume, 20)
3. 计算成交量加权收益 vwap_ret = ret_20d * volume_20d / ts_mean(volume_20d, 20)
calculation.python_signature: def short_term_reversal_vw(close: pd.Series, volume: pd.Series, window: int = 20) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_negative: IC均值 < 0
test_size_corr_low: 中性化后|size_corr| < 0.15
test_turnover_reasonable: 月度换手率 < 50%
test_high_volume_stronger: 高成交量子样本IC绝对值 > 低成交量子样本

factors.name: 彩票偏好规避
factors.a_share_validation: 强 (A股散户彩票偏好显著)

definition.explanation: 规避高最大日收益(MAX)、高特质波动率(ivol)、高偏度(skew)的股票。这些特征吸引散户过度追捧，导致未来低收益。

steps: 2. ivol_20d = std(residuals from market regression, 20)  # 特质波动率
calculation.python_signature: def lottery_avoidance(high: pd.Series, low: pd.Series, close: pd.Series, volume: pd.Series, market_ret: pd.Series, window: int = 20) -> pd.Series

expected_effect.drawdown_impact: 改善(降低极端波动暴露)

test_logic: test_ic_negative: 因子IC均值 < 0
test_corr_with_reversal: |corr(F002, F001)| < 0.5
test_high_max_underperform: MAX前20%组合未来收益 < MAX后20%

factors.name: 股东集中度
source_papers: 中国A股筹码集中度研究
factors.a_share_validation: 中(数据可得性受限)

definition.explanation: 股东户数减少=筹码集中(机构吸筹)。无股东数据时，用高换手率+近期正收益作为proxy。

steps: PRIMARY: 1. 获取季度股东户数 shareholders
PRIMARY: 2. 计算季度变化率 pct_change(shareholders, 1q)
PRIMARY: 3. 取负值 -pct_change(shareholders) # 减少=正信号
FALLBACK: 1. 计算20日换手率 turnover = volume / float_shares
calculation.python_signature: def shareholder_concentration(shareholders: pd.Series = None, volume: pd.Series = None, close: pd.Series = None, float_shares: pd.Series = None) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_fallback_works: 无shareholders列时fallback逻辑正确
test_positive_ic: 筹码集中应有正IC
test_low_turnover: fallback版本月度换手率 < 30%

factors.name: 收益加速(PEAD)
factors.a_share_validation: 中(季报披露后漂移显著但窗口短)

definition.explanation: 近期收益加速程度。5日收益相对20日收益的加速率，捕捉信息扩散初期的加速alpha。

calculation.python_signature: def earnings_acceleration_proxy(close: pd.Series, short_window: int = 5, long_window: int = 20) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_positive: 收益加速应有正IC
test_corr_with_momentum: |corr(F004, mom20d)| < 0.6 # 与纯动量不同

factors.name: 质量价值
factors.a_share_validation: 中(质量因子在A股有效但弱于美股)

definition.explanation: 在便宜股中筛选质量好的。低PB + 高经营现金流/市值，避免价值陷阱。

steps: FALLBACK: 组合 = -pb # 纯价值因子
calculation.python_signature: def quality_value(pb: pd.Series, operating_cashflow: pd.Series = None, mcap: pd.Series = None) -> pd.Series

expected_effect.drawdown_impact: 改善(质量过滤降低价值陷阱)

test_logic: test_fallback: 无财务数据时fallback到-pb
test_ic_positive: 质量价值应有正IC
test_avoid_trap: 高PB+低OCF组合未来收益 < 低PB+高OCF

factors.name: 特质波动率异象
factors.a_share_validation: 强(高ivol股票未来收益低)

definition.explanation: 高特质波动率股票未来收益更低。可能原因是高ivol吸引散户，或套利限制。

steps: 2. 市场回归 residuals = ret - beta * market_ret
calculation.python_signature: def idiosyncratic_volatility(close: pd.Series, market_ret: pd.Series, window: int = 20) -> pd.Series

expected_effect.drawdown_impact: 显著改善(降低高波动暴露)

test_logic: test_ic_negative: 高ivol应有负IC
test_corr_with_lottery: |corr(F006, F002)| < 0.6 # 与彩票因子不同

factors.name: 最大日收益(MAX)
factors.a_share_validation: 强(A股散户追涨停)

definition.explanation: 过去20日最大日收益(MAX)越高，未来收益越低。散户被单日大涨吸引，推高价格。

steps: 1. 日收益 ret = high / close - 1  # 用high/close而非close/close前日
calculation.python_signature: def max_daily_return(high: pd.Series, close: pd.Series, window: int = 20) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_negative: MAX因子应有负IC
test_high_max_underperform: MAX前20%组合未来收益显著低于后20%

factors.name: 盈利质量(应计异象)
factors.a_share_validation: 中(应计异象在A股存在但较弱)

definition.explanation: 高应计利润的股票未来收益更低。现金流比利润更可靠。

steps: 2. 或简化为 accruals = net_income - operating_cashflow
calculation.python_signature: def accruals_quality(accruals: pd.Series, total_assets: pd.Series) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_negative: 高应计应有负IC
test_cash_better: 高现金流组合收益 > 高利润组合

factors.name: 总资产增长率
factors.a_share_validation: 中(高增长公司往往过度投资)

definition.explanation: 资产增长率越低越好。高增长公司往往过度投资，资本配置效率低。

calculation.python_signature: def asset_growth(total_assets: pd.Series, window: int = 4) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_negative: 高资产增长应有负IC
test_investment_efficiency: 低增长组合ROE > 高增长组合

factors.name: 毛利率
factors.a_share_validation: 中(毛利率在A股有预测力但弱于ROE)

definition.explanation: Novy-Marx提出的质量因子。毛利率比ROE更稳定，更少被操纵。

calculation.python_signature: def gross_profitability(gross_profit: pd.Series, total_assets: pd.Series) -> pd.Series

expected_effect.drawdown_impact: 改善(质量因子降低风险)

test_logic: test_ic_positive: 毛利率应有正IC
test_stability: 毛利率IC稳定性 > ROE IC稳定性

factors.name: 非流动性(Amihud)
factors.a_share_validation: 强(非流动性溢价在A股显著)

definition.explanation: Amihud非流动性指标。高非流动性 = 高流动性风险 = 未来高收益补偿。

steps: 3. 取正值(不取负) # 高非流动性 = 高预期收益
calculation.python_signature: def amihud_illiquidity(close: pd.Series, amount: pd.Series, window: int = 20) -> pd.Series

expected_effect.drawdown_impact: 中性(小盘股流动性差但收益高)

test_logic: test_ic_positive: 非流动性应有正IC
test_small_cap_bias: 中性化后size_corr < 0.2

factors.name: 隔夜跳空
factors.a_share_validation: 中(A股跳空较多但T+1限制)

definition.explanation: 隔夜跳空方向与幅度。大幅向上跳空后往往有回补。

calculation.python_signature: def overnight_gap(open: pd.Series, close: pd.Series) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_negative: 大幅跳空应有负IC
test_gap_fill: 向上跳空后3日内回补概率 > 50%

factors.name: VWAP偏离
factors.a_share_validation: 中(日内结构数据可用但T+1限制)

definition.explanation: VWAP相对收盘价的偏离。vwap > close表示日内卖方主导(机构出货)。

calculation.python_signature: def vwap_deviation(vwap: pd.Series, close: pd.Series) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_negative: vwap>close应有负IC
test_distribution: vwap_deviation分布近似对称

factors.name: 价格-成交量相关性
factors.a_share_validation: 强(A股量价背离显著)

definition.explanation: 价格与成交量的秩相关性。负相关=价量背离=反转信号。

calculation.python_signature: def price_volume_divergence(close: pd.Series, volume: pd.Series, window: int = 10) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_positive: 负相关应有正IC
test_divergence_signal: 价量背离时未来5日收益反向

factors.name: 收益方差比
factors.a_share_validation: 中(低波动异象在A股存在)

definition.explanation: 短期波动率相对长期波动率的比率。高比率=波动率上升=风险增加。

calculation.python_signature: def volatility_ratio(close: pd.Series, short_window: int = 20, long_window: int = 60) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_negative: 高波动率比应有负IC
test_low_vol_outperform: 低波动组合长期收益 > 高波动组合

factors.name: 行业动量
factors.a_share_validation: 中(行业动量在A股有效但需行业分类)

definition.explanation: 行业层面的20日动量。领先行业在未来1-3个月继续跑赢。

steps: 2. 按行业分组计算均值 industry_avg = groupby(industry_code).mean(ret_20d)
calculation.python_signature: def industry_momentum(close: pd.Series, industry_code: pd.Series, window: int = 20) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_positive: 行业动量应有正IC
test_industry_persistence: 领先行业3个月后仍领先

factors.name: 异质信念波动率
factors.a_share_validation: 中(散户分歧度与收益负相关)

definition.explanation: 波动率与收益绝对值的比率。高比率=高分歧=散户观点分歧大=未来收益低。

calculation.python_signature: def disagreement_volatility(close: pd.Series, window: int = 20) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_negative: 高分歧应有负IC
test_high_turnover: 高分歧股票换手率显著更高

factors.name: 换手率异常
factors.a_share_validation: 强(高换手股票未来收益低)

definition.explanation: 换手率异常增长。换手率突然上升=散户涌入=未来收益低。

calculation.python_signature: def turnover_anomaly(volume: pd.Series, float_shares: pd.Series, window: int = 20) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_negative: 高换手增长应有负IC
test_retail_proxy: 高换手组合散户比例显著更高

factors.name: 收盘位置值
factors.a_share_validation: 中(日内收盘位置有信息)

definition.explanation: 日内收盘位置。+1=全天最高收盘(强势)，-1=全天最低收盘(弱势)。

calculation.python_signature: def close_location_value(open: pd.Series, high: pd.Series, low: pd.Series, close: pd.Series) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_positive: 高收盘位置应有正IC
test_continuation: 高收盘位置次日开盘跳空概率 > 50%

factors.name: 漂移状态动量
factors.a_share_validation: 弱(已在S7中实现，效果一般)

definition.explanation: 趋势状态判断。连续5日正收益=趋势状态=动量；否则=反转。

steps: 2. if ts_min(ret, 5) > 0: factor = rank(ret) # 动量
calculation.python_signature: def drift_state_momentum(close: pd.Series, short_window: int = 5) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_conditional: 趋势状态动量IC>0, 反转状态IC<0

factors.name: 贝塔套利
factors.a_share_validation: 弱(A股贝塔与收益关系不稳定)

definition.explanation: 低贝塔股票风险调整后收益更高。规避高贝塔陷阱。

calculation.python_signature: def beta_arbitrage(close: pd.Series, market_index: pd.Series, window: int = 60) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_negative: 高贝塔应有负IC
test_low_beta_outperform: 低贝塔组合夏普 > 高贝塔组合

factors.name: 收益偏度
factors.a_share_validation: 中(偏度偏好存在)

definition.explanation: 高偏度股票吸引彩票偏好投资者，导致定价过高。

calculation.python_signature: def skewness_avoidance(close: pd.Series, window: int = 60) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_negative: 高偏度应有负IC
test_lottery_corr: |corr(F022, F002)| < 0.6

factors.name: 趋势强度
factors.a_share_validation: 中(趋势判断在A股有效)

definition.explanation: 收益均值与标准差的比率。高比率=强趋势=动量持续。

calculation.python_signature: def trend_strength(close: pd.Series, window: int = 20) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_positive: 强趋势应有正IC
test_momentum_persistence: 强趋势组合未来20日收益 > 弱趋势

factors.name: ADR(累积/分布比率)
factors.a_share_validation: 中(日内资金流向有信息)

definition.explanation: 成交量变化方向与价格变化方向的交互。量价背离信号。

calculation.python_signature: def accumulation_distribution(close: pd.Series, volume: pd.Series) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_positive: 量价同向应有正IC
test_divergence: 量价背离时因子值最大

factors.name: 动量质量
factors.a_share_validation: 中(已在S10中部分实现)

definition.explanation: 高质量动量：高收益但低波动。高动量+低波动=机构主导的持续趋势。

calculation.python_signature: def momentum_quality(close: pd.Series, window: int = 20) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_positive: 高质量动量应有正IC
test_low_vol_filter: 组合波动率 < 纯动量组合

factors.name: 长尾收益
factors.a_share_validation: 弱(数据要求高)

definition.explanation: 日收益分布的尾部宽度。宽尾部=极端风险高=散户主导。

calculation.python_signature: def tail_return_spread(close: pd.Series, window: int = 60) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_negative: 宽尾部应有负IC
test_tail_risk: 宽尾部组合最大回撤 > 窄尾部

factors.name: 盈利动量
factors.a_share_validation: 中(季报动量在A股有效但窗口短)

definition.explanation: 标准化未预期盈余。盈余 surprise 越大，未来漂移越强。

steps: FALLBACK: 1. ret_60d = close / delay(close,60) - 1 # 用收益代替EPS surprise
calculation.python_signature: def earnings_momentum(EPS: pd.Series = None, expected_EPS: pd.Series = None, close: pd.Series = None) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_positive: SUE应有正IC
test_PEAD: 高SUE组合未来60日收益持续漂移

factors.name: 现金流价格比
factors.a_share_validation: 中(现金流比利润更可靠)

definition.explanation: 经营现金流/市值。比P/E更不容易被操纵。

calculation.python_signature: def cashflow_price(operating_cashflow: pd.Series = None, mcap: pd.Series = None, pb: pd.Series = None) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_positive: 高CFP应有正IC
test_vs_PE: CFP组合夏普 > P/E组合

factors.name: 研发投入强度
factors.a_share_validation: 弱(A股研发数据质量参差不齐)

definition.explanation: 研发投入强度。高研发投入公司未来成长潜力大。

calculation.python_signature: def rd_intensity(RD_expense: pd.Series, total_revenue: pd.Series) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_positive: 高研发投入应有正IC
test_growth: 高研发组合未来营收增长 > 低研发

factors.name: 分析师预期修正
factors.a_share_validation: 弱(分析师覆盖度低)

definition.explanation: 分析师预期上调。预期修正=新信息=未来收益。

steps: FALLBACK: 1. revision = ret_20d # 用近期收益代替
calculation.python_signature: def analyst_revision(EPS_estimate: pd.Series = None, previous_estimate: pd.Series = None, close: pd.Series = None) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_ic_positive: 预期上调应有正IC
test_revision_persistence: 上调后60日收益持续

factors.name: 52周高点接近度
factors.a_share_validation: 中(A股趋势与价格锚定效应显著)

definition.explanation: 当前收盘价距离过去252日最高价越近，投资者锚定在52周高点附近，趋势延续概率越高。

calculation.python_signature: def fifty_two_week_high_proximity(panel: pd.DataFrame, window: int = 252) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_near_high_scores_higher: 接近52周高点股票排名更高
test_no_lookahead: 未来价格扰动不改变历史因子值

factors.name: 同月季节性
factors.a_share_validation: 中(A股日历效应与资金季节性较强)

definition.explanation: 按股票和月份计算历史同一日历月收益的前序年份均值，避免使用当年当月收益。

calculation.python_signature: def seasonality_same_month(panel: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_same_month_history: 历史同月收益更高的股票排名更高
test_prior_year_shift: 当前月份收益不泄露到当月因子

factors.name: 下行Beta
factors.a_share_validation: 中(下跌市场中的风险暴露应获得折价)

definition.explanation: 仅在市场收益为负的交易日估算滚动Beta。下行Beta越高，尾部风险越大，未来收益越低。

calculation.python_signature: def downside_beta(panel: pd.DataFrame, window: int = 90) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_downside_beta_penalty: 下跌日高Beta股票排名更低
test_distinct_from_unconditional_beta: 与F021相关性较低

factors.name: 信息离散度动量质量
factors.a_share_validation: 中(A股信息扩散和涨跌停导致离散/连续信息差异)

definition.explanation: 同等过去收益下，连续小幅上涨比少数跳涨更具动量持续性，作为动量质量调整。

calculation.python_signature: def information_discreteness(panel: pd.DataFrame, window: int = 60) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_continuous_momentum_scores_higher: 连续上涨动量质量高于跳涨
test_distinct_from_momentum_quality: 与F025相关性较低

factors.name: 前景理论价值
factors.a_share_validation: 中(A股散户占比高，彩票/损失厌恶偏好强)

definition.explanation: 用Tversky-Kahneman价值函数和收益概率权重评估过去收益分布。前景理论价值越高越被追捧，未来收益越低。

calculation.python_signature: def prospect_theory_value(panel: pd.DataFrame, window: int = 60) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_high_tk_penalized: 高TK价值股票排名更低
test_handles_short_history: 短历史返回NaN且不报错

factors.name: 滚动最大回撤
factors.a_share_validation: 中(A股极端下跌后常有过度反应修复)

definition.explanation: 滚动窗口内从高点到低点的最大回撤幅度。深回撤代表路径风险和过度反应，作为反转候选信号。
